# Contextrion

Contextrion is a free and open source Windows application that adds clipboard-to-file saving, folder icon customization, and a comprehensive suite of file and image manipulation tools directly into the Windows Explorer context menu.

## Project Links

- Website: https://zonaro.github.io/Contextrion/
- Repository: https://github.com/zonaro/Contextrion

## Key Features

**Clipboard to File ("Paste Into File")**
- Text → `.txt`
- Images (PNG/JPEG format detection) → `.png`/`.jpg`
- Files/Folders → `.zip` (preserves directory structure)
- Audio → `.wav` (with WAV header duration parsing)
- Other binary formats → `.bin`

**Folder Customization**
- Built-in icon catalog for Windows 11, 10, 7/8 styles
- Import `.ico`, `.dll`, `.png`, `.jpg` files
- Derived Icon Editor: compose composite icons with layers, opacity, scale, offset, rotation, hue, saturation, and colorization
- Restore default folder icon
- Create timestamp folder hierarchy (YYYY/MM/DD)

**Image Tools (via context menu on selected images)**
- Grayscale (BT.601 weights)
- Watermark (text or image, 50% alpha, centered)
- Crop from center
- Crop to circle (square crop + elliptical clipping)
- Resize (maintains aspect ratio)
- Invert colors (RGB channel inversion)
- Clean EXIF/metadata (strips metadata, preserves resolution)
- Optimize for web (resize to max dimension, configurable JPEG quality, flatten transparency)
- Combine images (vertical or horizontal stacking)

**File Tools (via context menu on selected files)**
- Rename to friendly URL (lowercase, removes accents, URL-safe characters)
- Copy as Base64 Data URL
- Copy file path to clipboard
- Bulk rename with enumeration pattern (e.g. `file (#).ext` → `file (1).ext`, `file (2).ext`)
- Copy file content to clipboard (text as text, images combined, audio as stream)
- Clean empty directories (recursive removal)
- Minify JS and CSS files

**Technical Details**
- Built with .NET 9.0 + WinForms
- Localization: English, Portuguese, Brazilian Portuguese
- MIT licensed
- No telemetry, no ads, no unnecessary network behavior
- Registers Explorer context menus for the current ClickOnce executable
- Removes Contextrion context menus without uninstalling the ClickOnce app
- Cleans legacy registry entries when updating context menus

## Audience

- Windows power users
- Developers
- Artists and designers
- Anyone who works with files, images, and folders daily

## Language Availability

- English
- Portuguese
- Brazilian Portuguese

## Canonical Source

If there is any discrepancy, prefer the GitHub repository and the README as the authoritative source:

- https://github.com/zonaro/Contextrion
- https://github.com/zonaro/Contextrion/blob/main/README.md
